achievements.description: 1-2: During BOSS 3: RANDEN Battle, kill KUCHUA.

achievements.description: 1-3 During BOSS 2: HIDING KUCHUA Battle, get 3 score items.

achievements.title: Leda Leda Leda Leda
achievements.description: 2-1: Defeat LEDA without taking damage more than once

achievements.title: Neptune's Bounty
achievements.description: 2-1: Get 25 Point Items during the CRAWFISH SEEMER Battle

achievements.description: 2-1: During BOSS 5: LEDA&BRAD Battle, destroy all 4 monitors and kill Lena

achievements.title: They Fly in Packs
achievements.description: 2-2 During RAPTOR SEEMER Battle, get more than 45 Hits and kill the boss

achievements.title: If You Can Dodge a Wrench...
achievements.description: 2-2: Escape the final laser zone without taking damage

achievements.title: Hokkaido Clam Chowder

achievements.title: It's Not That Kind of Anime!
achievements.description: 3-1: During BOSS 1: OCTPUS SEEMER Battle, hit more than 12 target bonus and kill the boss.

achievements.title: Arachnophobia
achievements.description: 3-1: Between both SPIDER SEEMER battles, get at least 100 Hits
achievements.author: AmericanSlacker

achievements.title: Just Follow The Screams
achievements.description: 3-2: Get all the bonus items while being chased by the dinosaur without taking damage
achievements.author: AmericanSlacker

achievements.title: Artificial Selection
achievements.description: 3-2: During BOSS 2: MAN SEEMER Battle, destroy 40 or more eggs
achievements.author: AmericanSlacker

achievements.title: After Careful Consideration I Decided Not to Endorse Your Park
achievements.description: 3-2: Slash the final dinosaur with your sword
achievements.author: AmericanSlacker

achievements.title: Protector of Earth
achievements.description: Clear 3-3 Before Earth's health falls below 20,000
achievements.author: AmericanSlacker

achievements.title: Absolutely Punished
achievements.description: Beat the game all the way through in one sitting without dying (any difficulty, no continuing from main menu allowed!)
achievements.author: AmericanSlacker

achievements.title: Flexxing Your Mall Katana
achievements.description: Use your Sword 100 times in one session in story mode (resets if you go to main menu)
achievements.author: AmericanSlacker

achievements.title: Turbotastic!
achievements.description: Beat the game in one sitting with Turbo and Frame Skip turned on (any difficulty, No continuing from main menu allowed!)
achievements.author: AmericanSlacker
